mano_cua.result_summary: 测试任务要求在 components 目录下创建多层嵌套文件夹并引用组件，但 localhost:3000 是 Nuxt 组件演示页面，无文件管理 UI。mano-cua 尝试了 DevTools 路径和其他端口（8080/8888）均不可用，无法在浏览器内完成文件创建操作。页面本身可正常加载并显示已有组件。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Port 8888 is also not available. The task requires creating files in the components directory, but there's no web-based file editor available through the browser. The website at localhost:3000 is a simple Vue/Nuxt.js components demo page without any built-in file management UI. There's no web-based IDE or file manager accessible through the browser. Creating folders and files requires filesystem access which can only be done through Terminal, Finder, or a web-based file editor. The task cannot be completed within the browser alone.
